title: Aligning Two Different Modalities
concept: Multimodal alignment means training the text and image representations to share a common meaning space, so related concepts land close together.

exercises.prompt: If you see the word 'dog' and a photo of a dog, your brain treats them as...
exercises.explain: Your brain connects the word 'dog' and a picture of a dog because they both point to the same meaning, even though one is text and one is an image!

cards.title: Can a Computer See What a Word Means?
cards.body: Imagine showing a computer the word 'cat' and a photo of a cat. How does it know they mean the same thing? Words and pictures look totally different to a computer! Today we learn the trick AI uses to connect them.

cards.title: What Is Multimodal Alignment?
cards.body: Multimodal alignment is training an AI so that text and images about the same idea get placed close together in the AI's 'meaning space.' 'Modality' just means a type of input, like text, images, or sound. Aligning them means matching up their meanings.

cards.title: Two Languages, One Meaning
cards.body: Think of English and French. 'Dog' and 'chien' sound nothing alike, but they mean the same thing. A great translator maps both words to the same idea in their head. Multimodal alignment is like being a translator between the 'language' of pictures and the 'language' of words.

cards.title: Matching Photo to Caption
cards.body: An AI model is shown a photo of a puppy playing in the snow and the caption 'a puppy in the snow.' During training, the AI learns to place the photo's meaning and the caption's meaning right next to each other in its internal space, far away from unrelated things like 'a plate of pasta.'

cards.title: Myth: AI 'Sees' Like We Do
cards.body: Myth: The AI looks at a picture the same way our eyes do. Truth: The AI turns both the image and the text into lists of numbers. Alignment just means making sure the numbers for matching ideas end up close together in that numeric space.

cards.title: Before vs. After Alignment
cards.body: Alignment pulls matching text and image meanings together in the AI's shared space, so it can compare them directly.

left.text: Text 'cat' and cat photo are scattered far apart, like strangers who don't know they're talking about the same thing.

right.text: Text 'cat' and cat photo sit close together in shared meaning space, like two friends who agree on the same idea.

options.text: Making the AI faster at typing
Training text and image meanings to land close together in a shared space
Deleting images so only text is used
Making all photos black and white

exercises.explain: Correct! Alignment trains different modalities, like text and images, so matching ideas end up near each other in the AI's shared meaning space.

exercises.prompt: After alignment, a photo of a dog and the word 'dog' should end up far apart in the AI's meaning space.
exercises.explain: False! Good alignment means matching pairs, like a dog photo and the word 'dog,' end up close together, not far apart.

exercises.sentence: Multimodal alignment trains text and images to share a common ___ space.
exercises.explain: The word 'meaning' fits because alignment is all about matching what things represent, not how they look or sound.

exercises.prompt: Which pair shows well-aligned multimodal meanings?

options.text: The text 'sunset over ocean' placed near a photo of a sunset over the ocean
The text 'sunset over ocean' placed near a photo of a snowy mountain
The text 'sunset over ocean' placed randomly with no connection to any image

exercises.explain: Correct pairing means matching content, the sunset caption belongs near the sunset photo, not near an unrelated snowy mountain image or placed randomly.

exercises.prompt: An AI model is trained on captions and photos. Which outcome shows successful multimodal alignment?

options.text: The caption 'a red apple on a table' lands close to a photo of a red apple on a table
The caption 'a red apple on a table' lands close to a photo of a blue car
The AI ignores all images and only uses text
The AI stores images and text in completely separate, unconnected spaces

exercises.explain: Successful alignment means matching content ends up close together, so the apple caption and apple photo landing near each other shows the AI correctly connected the two modalities by meaning.
